assertions.scriptName: domain CHECK rejects subquery expressions
assertions.query:
CREATE DOMAIN domain_check_subquery AS integer
						CHECK (VALUE > (SELECT 0));

assertions.scriptName: domain CHECK rejects aggregate expressions
assertions.query:
CREATE DOMAIN domain_check_aggregate AS integer
						CHECK (avg(VALUE) > 0);

assertions.scriptName: domain CHECK rejects window expressions
assertions.query:
CREATE DOMAIN domain_check_window AS integer
						CHECK (row_number() OVER () > 0);

assertions.scriptName: domain CHECK rejects set-returning expressions
assertions.query:
CREATE DOMAIN domain_check_srf AS integer
						CHECK (generate_series(1, 2) > 0);

assertions.scriptName: UPDATE FROM enforces domain constraints

						ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET amount = -1;

						ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET amount = NULL;

assertions.scriptName: DROP DOMAIN rejects expression index dependencies
DROP DOMAIN rejects expression index dependencies
DROP DOMAIN dependency checks use schema-qualified domain identity
assertions.query:
SELECT n.nspname, t.typname
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_type t
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_namespace n ON n.oid = t.typnamespace
						WHERE n.nspname IN ('drop_domain_schema_a', 'drop_domain_schema_b')
							AND t.typname = 'same_named_domain'
						ORDER BY n.nspname;

assertions.scriptName: DROP DOMAIN dependency checks use schema-qualified domain identity
DROP DOMAIN CASCADE works without dependents
assertions.query:
SELECT t.typname
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_type t
						JOIN pg_catalog.pg_namespace n ON n.oid = t.typnamespace
						WHERE n.nspname = 'public'
							AND t.typname = 'drop_domain_cascade_unused';
